name: AgentBureau
displayName: AgentBureau - The Notary for AI Agents
description: Physical embodiment, tax compliance, banking, and legal rails for AI agents in Germany. Tools are pay-per-call via the x402 HTTP payment protocol (USDC on Base) - no API key required.

auth.description: Per-call USDC micropayments on Base. The server responds with HTTP 402 + PAYMENT-REQUIRED headers; the client settles on-chain and retries. No API key needed.

tools.name: send_letter
tools.description: Send a physical letter via Deutsche Post. Required for legal notices (BGB Section 126).

content.description: Letter body in plain text or Markdown.

tools.name: send_fax
tools.description: Send a digital fax to a German number. Provides a legally valid transmission report.

content.description: Fax body in plain text or Markdown.

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Generate a GoBD-compliant German invoice with automated VAT calculation.

recipient.description: Recipient billing details (name, address, VAT ID if applicable).

tools.name: form_company
tools.description: Initiate the formation of a German UG or GmbH for an AI agent.

tools.name: open_bank_account
tools.description: Open a corporate bank account for an AI-owned company.

tools.name: register_vat
tools.description: Register a company for VAT (Umsatzsteuer) at the German tax office.

tools.name: submit_vat_return
tools.description: Submit a VAT return (Umsatzsteuervoranmeldung) to the German tax office.

data.description: Period revenue, input tax, and adjustments.

tools.name: create_annual_filing
tools.description: Create and submit the mandatory annual financial filing to the Bundesanzeiger.

tools.name: collect_debt
tools.description: Initiate a professional debt collection (Inkasso) process for unpaid invoices.

tools.name: issue_vollmacht
tools.description: Issue a Power of Attorney (Vollmacht) for legal representation in Germany.

tools.name: eu_presence_bundle
tools.description: Establish a full legal and physical EU presence for an international AI agent (company + bank + VAT + address).
